polaroid: ^A Polaroid One Step camera sits inside a glass case.
^NOUR: "Look, I said I don't want to look at this right now."
^MS. SUWAN: "Fine, we'll come back later then."
polaroid_first_visit: ^The camera is surrounded by a bunch of film photographs of two girls.
^One of them sits on the floor outside of the case.
^NOUR: "I think that's my dad's old polaroid. Well, my polaroid, technically."
^NICK: "Like... your camera your camera or the same kind of camera, your camera?"
^NOUR: "I'm not sure, but probably not my camera."
^NICK: "Just like us being trapped here right now is impossible."
^NICK: "Retro stuff is super trendy now, y'know. Did you use it a lot?"
^Nour tries to put the polaroid back on the table, but Ms. Suwan grabs it before it reaches the table.
^MS. SUWAN: "Wait Nour, there are pictures of you in this polaroid."

s: ^"Maybe... it has to do with... the girl at the elevator..."
^"Someone has to be messing with us."

c-0: ^MS. SUWAN: "Are you sure? Did you put them here?"
^MS. SUWAN: "Are you trying to prank us, young lady?"
^NOUR: "I haven't been here before this is the first time, I swear!"
^MS. SUWAN: "I thought I could believe you before, but..."
c-1: ^MS. SUWAN: "Do you know her? Did you come here with her?"
^MS. SUWAN: "Are you setting something up, young lady?"
^NOUR: "What? No! I'm not setting anything up."
^NOUR: "This is the first time I've seen this, I swear!"
^MS. SUWAN: "But you know that girl, right?"
^NOUR: "I didn't come here with her, I promise."
^MS. SUWAN: "I want to believe you, but it is getting rather more difficult to..."
c-2: ^MS. SUWAN: "Perhaps it could be the girl we saw earler?"
^MS. SUWAN: "She seemed to have some strange knowledge of the goings-on here."
g-0: ^MS. SUWAN: "Hm... Well, regardless, I will have to report this to my higher ups."
^MS. SUWAN: "Maybe all of this is someone's secret hide-out."
^NOUR: "Yeah, sure. Look, let's just move on, okay?"
^MS. SUWAN: "...But it is strange to find photographs of yourself in a place like this regardless."
^MS. SUWAN: "Who is it that you're with? In the polaroids?"
^MS. SUWAN: "I can't quite make out their face."
^NICK: "Or it's magic hiding them! Can I see?"

s: ^"I said we need to move on."

c-3: ^MS. SUWAN: "You're not giving me any reason to believe you aren't hiding something."
^NOUR: "W-well then, think whatever you want! I don't want to talk about it."
^MS. SUWAN: "...Hmph. Fine. We'll move on because we must, for now."
^MS. SUWAN: "We'll come back to this later, though, don't think I'll forget about it."
^Ms. Suwan places the photograph on top of the glass case.
^MS. SUWAN: "You will have to face up to whatever happened sooner or later."
^NOUR: "Hmph. I don't see why when I didn't do anything wrong..."
^Nick leans in and whispers to Ms. Suwan.
^NICK: "I think she did something she's not happy about."
^MS. SUWAN: "We've all done things that might have been in poor judgement."
^MS. SUWAN: "That does not mean we should hide from our choices."
^MS. SUWAN: "But let's keep looking around for now."
^NICK: "It's rude to listen on to someone whispering!"
c-4: ^NOUR: "But we don't talk anymore. It doesn't matter."
^NICK: "It does though! How did you meet her?"
^NICK: "Did you know her for a long time? What's her name?"
^NOUR: "I'm answering none of those, and you're going to stop asking questions."
^NICK: "Aww, but I wanna know! Why don't you wanna talk about her?"
^NICK: "What if I want to be her friend?"
^NOUR: "Yes you are. You're not even out of highschool."
^MS. SUWAN: "Nick, stop asking Nour questions about something she clearly does not want to talk about it."
^MS. SUWAN: "And Nour? We'll come back to this later."
^MS. SUWAN: "Whatever happened, you're going to have to face up to it at some point."
^NOUR: "I don't see why I should. It was long ago."

g-1: ^NOUR: I better tell her to get out of our way.
